personal_info.summary_en: Liangliang Sun, currently serving as Professor and Asscociate Dean at the School of Control Engineering, Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao, China, brings a wealth of expertise to his roles. He previously held the position of Senior Visiting Scholar at the University of Connecticut. Sun's distinguished achievements include being recognized as a key figure in the "Xingliao Talent Plan" and attaining the Thousand-Person Level in the "Hundred and Ten Thousand Talents Project" in Liaoning, China.
